registers</h1><font>Layout of how "fractured registers" work on my architecture. Each 32-bit register fractured into two 16-bit registers, which are fractured into four 8-bit registers.<br>Last number in register name is register specifier so 0-1 in ry registers and 0-3 in rz registers.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="180" x="40" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.span:
Layout of how "fractured registers" work on my architecture. Each 32-bit register fractured into two 16-bit registers, which are fractured into four 8-bit registers.
Last number in register name is register specifier so 0-1 in ry registers and 0-3 in rz registers.
